creator: r@rfmoz.eu
text:
Created attachment 221238
Patch to upgrade port to Tuptime 5.0.2

Hi,


Tuptime have a new release (5.0.2) and it would be nice to have it on FreeBSD.

Changelog:

 * Option --decp usable but deprecated
 * Using subprocess module on BSDs

Please, see the attached patch with the PORT upgrade changes.



Thanks,
